data.title: Zenith Energy Prepares for Final Arbitration Hearings in Tunisia Dispute
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Zenith Energy ( (GB:ZEN) ) has provided an update.

Zenith Energy Ltd. announced the completion of the pre-hearing session of the ICC-2 Arbitration concerning the Sidi El Kilani concession against the Republic of Tunisia, with final hearings scheduled for next week. The arbitration arises from alleged losses due to Tunisia’s actions, including lost revenues and unpaid invoices, with Zenith’s subsidiary seeking approximately USD 130 million in claims. The outcome of this arbitration could significantly impact Zenith’s financial position and its ongoing operations in the region.

More about Zenith Energy

Zenith Energy Ltd. is an independent energy company specializing in energy production, exploration, and development with assets in North Africa, the US, and Europe. The company focuses on developing proven, revenue-generating energy production assets and engaging in low-risk exploration activities.

YTD Price Performance: 66.32%

Average Trading Volume: 2,721,715

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £18.94M

data.title: ING Announces Redemption of Perpetual Capital Securities
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

ING GROEP ( (GB:0RIC) ) has shared an update.

ING has announced its decision to redeem USD 1,250 million of 6.500% Perpetual Additional Tier 1 Contingent Convertible Capital Securities by April 16, 2025, as part of its strategy to optimize its capital structure. This move reflects ING’s focus on economic considerations and stakeholder interests, while also considering market conditions, regulatory approval, and capital requirements, potentially impacting its financial operations and stakeholder confidence.

More about ING GROEP

ING is a global financial institution with a strong European base, offering banking services through its operating company ING Bank. It serves customers in over 40 countries with a focus on retail and wholesale banking. ING is committed to sustainability, as evidenced by its strong ESG ratings and involvement in sustainable finance activities.

data.title: Repsol Announces Share Buyback and Dividend Plans
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Repsol ( (ES:REP) ).

Repsol’s Board of Directors is proposing a capital reduction by canceling specific treasury shares, acquired through a buyback program and derivatives settlements, with an investment of up to 300 million euros. Additionally, the company plans to pay a complementary dividend of 0.5 euros per share, enhancing shareholder remuneration to 0.975 euros per share in 2025, potentially strengthening its market position and shareholder value.

More about Repsol

Repsol, S.A. operates in the energy sector, focusing primarily on oil, gas, and related products. It is a significant player in the global energy market, with operations spanning exploration, production, refining, and distribution.

data.title: Odakyu Electric Railway to Improve Asset Efficiency with Sotetsu Holdings Share Sale
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Odakyu Electric Railway Co ( (JP:9007) ).

Odakyu Electric Railway Co., Ltd. announced its participation in the secondary offering of common stock by Sotetsu Holdings, Inc., deciding to sell all its shares in the latter to improve asset efficiency. This move aligns with Odakyu’s strategy of enhancing corporate value through better capital cost management and investment, while maintaining a strong business relationship with Sotetsu Holdings. The sale is expected to result in extraordinary income for Odakyu, which will be reflected in its financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025.

More about Odakyu Electric Railway Co

Odakyu Electric Railway Co., Ltd. operates in the railway and transportation industry, providing rail services primarily in Japan. The company is also involved in real estate and retail businesses, catering to urban and suburban markets.

data.title: Schneider Electric Achieves Record 2024 Results and Sets Ambitious 2025 Targets
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Schneider Electric ( (FR:SU) ) has shared an update.

Schneider Electric reported record financial results for 2024, highlighting an 8% organic revenue growth, with energy management experiencing a 12% increase, although industrial automation saw a 4% decline. The company achieved an adjusted EBITA of 7.1 billion euros, with a margin improvement and strong free cash flow generation. Recognized as the most sustainable company in the world, Schneider Electric exceeded its sustainability targets and proposed a progressive dividend increase. Looking towards 2025, the company aims for continued growth in adjusted EBITA and revenue, driven by strong performance across its key markets.

More about Schneider Electric

Schneider Electric operates in the energy management and industrial automation industry, providing products and services primarily focused on electrical distribution and digital transformation. It is recognized for its commitment to sustainable practices and has been named the most sustainable company globally.

data.title: eDreams ODIGEO Reports Record Profitability with Prime Subscription Growth
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

EDreams ODIGEO ( (ES:EDR) ) has provided an update.

eDreams ODIGEO has reported record profitability with a 70% increase in EBITDA Cash for the third quarter of the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, driven by a robust increase in Prime subscribers. The company’s travel subscription model has led to significant growth, with Prime subscriptions exceeding 7 million by February 2025, and the company is on track to meet its financial objectives for March 2025, enhancing its market position and potential returns for stakeholders.

More about EDreams ODIGEO

eDreams ODIGEO is a global leader in travel subscriptions and one of Europe’s largest e-commerce companies. It focuses on providing a travel subscription platform called Prime, offering flexible options such as booking cancellations, price freezes, and personalized offers through AI, collaborating with over 700 airlines and numerous accommodations, packages, and car rentals.
